title: Pipeline filtering steps for Curatopes Melanoma
author: Lischer, Christopher
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The archive gathers scripts and custom datasets implementing the pipeline filtering steps as described in the scientific article on Curatopes Melanoma (https://curatopes.com/melanoma/).
steps_raw: The archive gathers scripts and custom datasets implementing the pipeline filtering steps as described in the scientific article on Curatopes Melanoma (https://curatopes.com/melanoma/).
